episodes.body: The city council implemented a new zoning policy allowing mixed-use developments in downtown areas.
The zoning policy was updated to restrict high-rise buildings in residential zones.
A further revision to the zoning policy permitted high-rise buildings in designated commercial zones.

queries.query: What is the current zoning policy regarding high-rise buildings in commercial zones?
queries.gold_answer: High-rise buildings are permitted in designated commercial zones.
queries.expected_reason: The February 2024 revision allows high-rise buildings in commercial zones.

queries.query: What was the zoning policy for high-rise buildings in April 2023?
queries.gold_answer: High-rise buildings were restricted in residential zones.
queries.expected_reason: The policy in April 2023 restricted high-rise buildings in residential zones.

queries.query: What is the latest update to the zoning policy?
queries.gold_answer: The zoning policy was revised in February 2024 to permit high-rise buildings in commercial zones.
queries.expected_reason: The February 2024 update is the latest change to the zoning policy.

episodes.body: Ticket #5678 was opened by Emily Clark for a network outage affecting the Beta service.
Ticket #5678 was escalated to the network team for urgent resolution.
The network team resolved the outage and ticket #5678 was marked as resolved.

queries.query: What is the latest status of ticket #5678?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was resolved after being escalated.

queries.query: What was the status of ticket #5678 on December 2, 2023?
queries.expected_reason: The ticket was escalated on the specified date.
